loop1.title: PQ Issues KPI Strip (Total Issues / I-THD Events / V-THD Events / PF Gap Feeders / Neutral Stress / Worst I-THD / Worst V-THD)
loop1.note: Showing I-THD, V-THD, PF Gap, and Neutral Stress event counts for outgoing feeders; harmonic magnitudes (h3/h5/h7) and peak THD are not measured by this panel's aggregate schema.

loop1.title: Harmonics & PQ Timeline
loop1.note: Showing event history for 8 primary feeders; 2 members (GIC-02-N6-UPS-05, GIC-02-N7-UPS-06) have no data and are blanked.

loop1.title: AI Summary
loop1.note: Showing narrative summary for all panel members; UPS-05 and UPS-06 have no live data (has_data=N) and will render as dark/blank in the roster.

loop1.title: Feeder PQ At {period}
loop1.note: Showing per-feeder THD and power — decimal thresholds and 3rd/5th/7th harmonic counts are not measured for this asset.

loop1.title: Signature
loop1.note: Showing active power (kW) and PF/THD metrics from member meters; 3rd harmonic, K-factor, and peak-THD columns are not measured by these UPS/BPDB meters and are omitted.
